'''Destreg II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
Destreg II was a small planet orbited by [[Destreg Spaceport]], a small but expensive-looking [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Construction Corporation]] [[Golan Space Colony 2|space station]]. The planet apparently had quite significant amounts of civilian traffic.

==History==
[[K'Armyn Viraxo]] set a [[Assassination attempt on K'Armyn Viraxo|trap]] for [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] here, luring them with the premise of him supposedly being on his [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]], the ''[[Highroller]]''. However, the two outlaws managed to both destroy his yacht—his lure—and evade [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrols and a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].

==Behind the system==
The mission briefing for the game's Destreg II level refers to the planet as ''Dresteg II''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
